selectedWork.title: Why AI models are bad at verifying photos
selectedWork.description: Testing how leading AI image models perform when asked to verify the authenticity of photos.

selectedWork.imageAlt: Comparison charts of eight AI search engines' citation performance
selectedWork.title: AI search has a citation problem
selectedWork.description: Comparing eight AI search engines and their ability to cite news sources.
selectedWork.more: We tested eight AI search tools—including ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Gemini, and Copilot—with 200 real news excerpts. In over 60% of cases they failed to return the correct article, title, or URL. Many gave confident wrong answers or broken links. The report has been covered by Nieman Lab, Ars Technica, Axios, and El País.

selectedWork.title: How AI browsers sneak past blockers and paywalls
selectedWork.description: How AI-powered browsers can bypass paywalls and ad blockers and what publishers are doing.

selectedWork.imageAlt: Chatbot correcting a false premise in a user query
selectedWork.title: AI chatbots can search the web – so why don't they?
selectedWork.description: Why major chatbots often avoid live web search and what that means for news.

selectedWork.title: Automating the boring stuff with PollFinder.ai
selectedWork.description: How PollFinder.ai helps automate the tedious work of finding and tracking polls for newsrooms.
